title: Trademark Registration Service - BookmyTM, Kerala
h1: Your Brand, Your Business, Your Legacy: Trademark Registration Service

blocks.text: Your Brand, Your Business, Your Legacy: Trademark Registration Service

In the bustling business landscape of Kerala—from the spice markets of Kochi to the tech parks of Thiruvananthapuram—your brand name is more than just a word. It is the vessel that holds your reputation, your customer’s trust, and your commercial goodwill.
Fill the details below for a callback.
But in a competitive market, a great name is also a target. Without legal protection, your brand is vulnerable to copycats, counterfeiters, and competitors.

As Kerala's most trusted Intellectual Property (IP) partner, BookMyTM is dedicated to securing your business identity. We provide end-to-end trademark solutions, ensuring that the brand you build today remains yours forever. This comprehensive guide covers everything you need to know about the lifecycle of a trademark and how our specialized services protect you at every stage.

A common misconception among business owners in Kerala is that registering a company (Private Limited or LLP) or getting a GST number protects their brand name. It does not. Only a registered Trademark grants you the exclusive legal right to use your brand name across India.
A registered trademark is an intangible asset. It can be valued, sold, franchised, or used as collateral for loans.
It gives you the power to sue infringers for damages. Without it, you are limited to the weaker common law remedy of "passing off."
For Kerala’s exporters, an Indian trademark is the foundation for international protection under the Madrid Protocol.
Fill the details below for a callback.
If you are in business, you need a trademark. It is that simple. However, certain sectors in Kerala face higher risks and have specific needs:
Investors invest in brands, not just code. Protecting your IP is often a prerequisite for funding.
With global demand rising, "Generic" names are often rejected. You need expert help to register unique brand identities.
Trust is everything in retail. A registered logo protects your storefront from look-alike competitors confusing your loyal customers.
To sell on Amazon/Flipkart or export to the GCC/EU, a Brand Registry (based on a trademark) is mandatory.
The BookMyTM Trademark Registration Service Ecosystem
Managing a trademark is a lifecycle process. It doesn't end with filing. Below are the 9 core services we offer, covering every stage of your brand's journey.
The Foundation. Filing the application (Form TM-A) secures your "Priority Date." We handle the entire process with the Chennai Registry digitally.
The Defense. Over 60% of applications receive an objection. We draft a legally robust reply to prove your mark's distinctiveness and keep your application alive.
The Argument. If the reply isn't accepted, we represent you via Video Conferencing before the Registrar to secure your acceptance.
The Battle. Protect your brand from copycats or defend your application against rivals during the 4-month Journal publication window.
The Maintenance. A trademark is valid for 10 years. We help you file for renewal (Form TM-R) to secure your brand for another decade.
The Correction. Remove "dead" trademarks blocking your path or fix register errors. Useful for cancelling competitors' unused marks.
The Transfer. Legally transfer ownership during business acquisitions or mergers via a "Deed of Assignment" filed with the Registry.
The Monetization. Franchise your brand while retaining ownership. We draft "Registered User Agreements" for legal compliance.
The Surveillance. Prevent dilution of your identity. We monitor new applications 24/7 to alert you of look-alikes.
A trademark is the only thing that separates your "Original" from a "Duplicate."
Don't leave your most valuable asset unprotected.
Filing a trademark in India is a streamlined digital process with BookMyTM. We strip away the complexity.
PAN Card and Aadhaar/Passport of the applicant.
Udyam (MSME) or Incorporation Certificate. (MSME/Startups get 50% off Govt fees!)
The Logo image (in JPEG) or the Wordmark you want to protect.
Old invoices or ads to claim "Prior User" status.
A simple form authorizing our attorneys to represent you at the Chennai Registry (No notarization required).
We understand the pulse of Kerala's business ecosystem.
Deeply rooted in Kerala, covering the entire Indian jurisdiction.
No visits, no travel. Everything via email, WhatsApp, and VC.
No hidden fees. Upfront costs for Govt fees & professional charges.
